comments.author: derek
comments.text: Plan: add GitHub Action to auto-run pip-compile on changes to python/pyproject.toml, commit updated requirements*.txt back to branch using GITHUB_TOKEN. Will target PR branches (not main) and guard against CI loops.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Implemented .github/workflows/requirements-sync.yml to run pip-compile on python/pyproject.toml changes, generate python/requirements*.txt, and auto-commit/push if changed. Uses GITHUB_TOKEN with contents: write and skips when actor is github-actions[bot] to prevent loops.
